items.html: After the above restriction, there remained a place of space and vacant, empty air in the very middle of that light of Ein Sof1. Then there was a place where the emanated beings and the created beings and the formed beings and the made beings could be. Then, He extended one straight line from the light of Ein Sof2, from His circular light3 from above downward4, and it cascades and descends into that space.
The upper beginning of the line5 is extended from Ein Sof Himself and touches it6, but the end of that line, down at its end7, does not touch the light of Ein Sof.
The Light of Ein Sof is extended and expanded down through that line.
He emanated and created and made and formed 8 all the worlds in the place of that space.

Prior to these four worlds 9, Ein Sof was He is one and His name is One 10, in wondrous and concealed unity. Not even the angels that are close to Him 20 have the might and the attainment of Ein Sof, for there is not a mind of a created being that can attain Him, for He has no place, no boundary, and no name 30.
